headlines.title: King's speech was a 'high stakes' moment of US visit, Palace says
headlines.description: The state visit to the US draws a positive response after what was a difficult diplomatic challenge.

headlines.title: Airlines can cancel flights in advance over fuel shortages under new plans
headlines.description: Ministers hope move would help avoid last-minute flight cancellations for passengers this summer over Middle East fuel supplies.

headlines.title: Germany troop cuts send wrong signal to Russia, say two top US Republicans
headlines.description: The chairs of the House and Senate armed services committees say withdrawing 5,000 service personnel risked undermining deterrence.

headlines.title: The Iran war has strengthened Ukraine in surprising ways. Could a ceasefire with Russia be closer?
headlines.description: President Zelensky has been visiting the Gulf to demonstrate his country's military nous.

headlines.title: From beds to LED masks, is the red light craze giving us more than just a warm glow?
headlines.description: Whether it can really repair muscles and make skin look younger is up for debate.

headlines.title: Man charged with murder and sexual assault of 5-year-old Australian girl

headlines.title: Is it advantage Arsenal in dramatic title race?
headlines.description: Are Arsenal now firmly in pole position to be Premier League champions after the Gunners went six points clear of Manchester City with a 3-0 win over Fulham.

headlines.title: Musk's AI told me people were coming to kill me. I grabbed a hammer and prepared for war
headlines.description: Several people told the BBC they experienced delusions after intense conversations with AI.

headlines.title: The clandestine network smuggling Starlink tech into Iran to beat internet blackout
headlines.description: Sahand tells the BBC World Service he sends satellite internet terminals into Iran to help show "the real picture".

headlines.title: What death doulas can teach us about dying
headlines.description: Death doulas or soul midwives have increased in popularity in recent years. What do they do?

headlines.title: Watch: How we reported in -30C temperatures in Canada's Arctic
headlines.description: BBC's Nadine Yousif and Eloise Alanna spent five days travelling with the country's military rangers through frostbite and sub-zero temperatures.

headlines.title: Voters will judge Trump on the economy - how is it doing?
headlines.description: How much Donald Trump can do with the time he has left as president will depend massively on the cost of living.

headlines.title: Celebrity Traitors line-up announced - 21 famous faces set to enter castle

headlines.title: Winners, losers and a PM on the brink - what to expect in next week's elections

headlines.title: The Papers: '£7m tax bill for William' and 'Traitors take their places'

headlines.title: Struggling High Streets fuel sense of neglect for voters ahead of local elections

headlines.title: Thirteen killed in Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon, health ministry says
headlines.description: Four women and a child are among the dead, as fighting between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah continues despite a ceasefire.

headlines.title: Welsh nans befriend pro wrestler on Vegas flight after royal rumble over seats
headlines.description: The group was travelling to Las Vegas to scatter the ashes of one of their late husbands.

headlines.title: Rare 400-year-old gown to go on display

headlines.title: Creating Roo, the missing Winnie-the-Pooh toy, for Camilla's US visit
headlines.description: The original toys - Pooh, Eeyore, Piglet, Kanga and Tigger - are on display in New York, but Roo has been missing for decades.

headlines.title: What would it cost England and Scotland fans to go to World Cup?
headlines.description: High ticket prices, expensive accommodation and train fares way above normal rates. If you want to book a World Cup trip now, this is what it would cost.

headlines.title: 'I completely blew it' - Wu into final as Allen misses simple black to win

headlines.title: Heartbroken Allen loses semi-final after fluffing winning pot
